description: Deke announces his success in hacking Sarge's tracker, revealing the location of two converging Shrike. May organizes teams: she and Yo-Yo will hunt the Shrike using a Quinjet, planning to rendezvous on the Zephyr. The team mobilizes, determined to contain the alien infestation.

transcript.line: Hey. So, I found a fix in this tracker, of course. I analyzed the alien encryption... Not easy... And found a way to hack it. That's just me, guy from future who doesn't belong. If you look, there's two other dots, and it looks like they're moving towards each other.
Once we're in the air, you'll take a pilot and peel off in a Quinjet. We'll each bag a Shrike, then rendezvous on the Zephyr.
And it's capture, not kill, right?
That's right. Look. Just because we couldn't save them before doesn't mean we can't now.
This is Zephyr One... We're en route to target. We'll check in when we've caught the birds.
